meta.defaultTitle: Snake Online — マルチプレイヤー蛇バトルロイヤル
meta.defaultDescription: Snake Online をプレイ：究極のマルチプレイヤー蛇 .io ゲーム。何千人ものプレイヤーと戦い、レアスキンを集め、世界ランキングを駆け上がろう。iOS、Android、Web で無料。

home.title: Snake Online — マルチプレイヤー蛇バトルロイヤル
home.description: 何千人もの実在プレイヤーをリアルタイムで出し抜こう。200以上の伝説スキン。iOS、Android、Web で無料。

play.title: Snake Online をプレイ — ブラウザで無料
play.description: アリーナへ直行。インストール不要、登録不要。リアルタイムのマルチプレイヤー蛇バトルをブラウザで、永久無料。

downloads.title: Snake Online ダウンロード — iOS、Android、Windows、Mac
downloads.description: あらゆるプラットフォームで Snake Online を。iPhone、iPad、Android、Windows、macOS のネイティブアプリ。クロスプログレス。永久無料。

snakes.title: 蛇スキン — 200以上のハンドクラフトキャラクター
snakes.description: 6 段階のレア度を持つ 200 以上のハンドクラフトスキンを発見。国旗、ネオン、神話、伝説のデザインであなたの蛇をユニークに。

gameRanking.description: Snake Online の世界最強プレイヤーのライブグローバルランキング。毎時更新。リーダーボードを駆け上がり、王座を手に入れよう。

community.title: Snake Online コミュニティ — 蛇ネーションに参加
community.description: 500 万人のプレイヤー。Discord、トーナメント、コンテンツクリエイター。グローバルな Snake Online コミュニティとつながり、アリーナの未来を形作ろう。

compare.title: Snake Online vs the rest.
compare.subtitle: We rebuilt the .io snake genre from the ground up. Here's what changed.
compare.disclaimer: Comparison based on publicly available information from worms.zone and the Worms Zone mobile app, captured May 2026. Worms Zone is a trademark of its respective owners.

faq.title: Answers to everything.
faq.subtitle: Real questions from real players. If your question isn't here, hit support — we read every message.

whatIsIt.a: Snake Online is a free real-time multiplayer .io snake battle royale. Coil opponents, eat their orbs, climb the global leaderboard. 200+ collectible skins, 180+ country leaderboards, available on iOS, Android, and any modern web browser.

isItFree.a: Yes. Free forever, no signup required for browser play. There are no paywalls and no pay-to-win advantages — skins are purely cosmetic and most can be earned through play.

doINeedToDownload.q: Do I need to download anything?
doINeedToDownload.a: Not for the web — just hit Play and you're in the arena in seconds. For mobile, free native apps are available on the App Store and Google Play with the same cross-progression.

howManySkins.q: How many snake skins are there?
howManySkins.a: Over 200 hand-crafted skins across six rarity tiers: Common, Rare, Epic, Legendary, Mythic, and Exclusive. New seasonal drops every month — including country-flag exclusives for 180+ nations.

isItMultiplayer.q: Is it true real-time multiplayer (not bots)?
isItMultiplayer.a: Yes. Every snake in your arena is a real human player. We run edge servers in 12 global regions for sub-100ms latency, so coils, cuts, and traps feel instant — not laggy.

whichDevices.q: Which devices does it run on?
whichDevices.a: Any modern web browser (Chrome, Safari, Firefox, Edge), iPhone, iPad, Android phones and tablets. One account syncs across all of them.

howToWin.q: How do I get bigger faster?
howToWin.a: Patience and positioning beat aggression. Hug the perimeter, scavenge orbs from kills, only commit to a coil-trap when the target is straight-line locked. Boost burns mass — use it sparingly, only to close a kill or escape.

vsWormzone.q: How is Snake Online different from Worms Zone?
vsWormzone.a: Worms Zone is mostly single-player against AI bots, English-only, with no public leaderboard or web version. Snake Online is real-time multiplayer against humans, supports 14 languages, has a live global leaderboard, and runs natively in the browser with cross-progression to mobile.

vsSlither.q: How is it different from Slither.io?
vsSlither.a: Snake Online keeps Slither's intuitive controls but adds: 200+ collectible skins (vs Slither's ~50), 180+ country leaderboards, daily tournaments, hourly-updated public rankings, and full cross-platform progression. Skill-only progression — no pay-to-win.

progressSync.q: Does my progress sync across devices?
progressSync.a: Yes. Sign in once and your trophies, skins, friends, and tournament entries follow you between iOS, Android, and web automatically.
